name: Rice Extract
description: Rice extract (rice bran, rice ferment filtrate) has been a staple in Asian beauty rituals for centuries, famously credited for the flawless skin of Japanese geisha. It is rich in ferulic acid, phytic acid, and vitamins B and E, which brighten skin, even out discoloration, and provide antioxidant protection while gently moisturizing.

relatedProducts.name: Beauty of Joseon Relief Sun Rice + Probiotics
